use_cases: Toggle between light and dark themes with smooth animated wipe transitions
Persist user's theme preference to localStorage for consistent experience
Synchronize theme state across the entire application using MutationObserver
Add elegant theme switching to any web application with minimal setup
ai_summary: A polished theme toggle component that switches between light and dark modes with a smooth clip-path wipe animation. Uses the View Transitions API and Framer Motion for fluid morphing effects, while persisting user preferences to localStorage and syncing state via MutationObserver. Ideal for modern web applications seeking elegant, accessible dark mode implementations.
